_comment: Generated by scripts/anthropic/sync-skills.mjs — do not edit by hand. Tracks which local lib/anthropic/skills/<agent>/<name>.md has been synced to Anthropic and its current skill_id + version. Re-running sync skips entries whose content_hash matches the local file.

uk-vat-flat-rate._note: Uploaded manually via the Anthropic console before sync automation existed. Content hash is a placeholder — the next sync run will detect a mismatch and create a new version with the current local content.
